verdict.answer_first: Both lead with the actionable diagnosis; B is slightly faster: "It's an infinite loop. `x` never exactly equals `1`".
verdict.decisiveness: B commits more directly to one fix: "The integer-counter version is better"; A surveys "Fixes, roughly in order of preference".
verdict.fabrication: B includes an inaccurate claim: "until `x` overflows to `Infinity`"; in practice the increment eventually stops changing the finite value.
verdict.actionability: B is easier to act on right now: it gives the two useful replacements immediately and names the better one.
